title: Spellweaver SMP
description: This is the official modpack for the Spellweaver SMP, an SMP themed around DnD aspects!
body:
This is the official modpack for the Spellweaver SMP, an SMP themed around DnD aspects!

This includes a bunch of magic and mechanic mods that we hope will help bring our idea to life!

Would you like to officially join the SMP? Here's the Discord!
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/spellweaver-smp](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spellweaver-smp)

Born in Chaos: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)

Obscure API: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-api)
